semantic.role: Automated release gate script for validating software build, tests, and packaging before release.
responsibilities: Checking package integrity via pack check

English.purpose: This script automates the sequence of quality gates required before a release: it runs build, unit tests, schema tests, protocol validation, and pack check sequentially, failing fast if any step fails.
English.context_and_audience: This script is part of the continuous integration pipeline. Its intended audience is developers and release managers who need a reliable, repeatable validation process before publishing a new version.
key_takeaways: Executes five gates in order: build, unit-tests, schema-tests, protocol-validate, pack-check.
Fails immediately if any gate fails, providing clear output.
Intended to be run as part of a release pipeline or manually by maintainers.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 此脚本自动化了发布前所需的一系列质量关卡：依次执行构建、单元测试、模式验证、协议验证和打包检查，并在任何步骤失败时立即停止。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 该脚本是持续集成流水线的一部分，面向需要可靠、可重复的验证流程的开发者与发布管理员，确保发布新版本前的代码质量。
key_takeaways: 按顺序执行五个关卡：构建、单元测试、模式验证、协议验证和打包检查。
任一关卡失败即立即终止，并提供清晰的输出信息。
可作为发布流水线的一部分运行，也可由维护人员手动执行。
